stench:message-levelup-4: You reek. Creatures keep their distance.
stench:message-levelup-5: You are utterly repulsive. Even drifters ignore you.
stench:cfg-showbar-comment: Client-side HUD bar visibility. Applies automatically in-world after the client config reloads.
stench:cfg-segmentedbar-comment: Use the clean/dirty pivot bar. Full green means clean, empty is the 2/5 -> 3/5 breakpoint, and dirt refills from the left toward brown.
stench:cfg-showoverlay-comment: Client-side full-screen grime overlay for high stench levels.
stench:cfg-showdebugoverlay-comment: Client-side visibility toggle. Detailed rates still depend on server debug telemetry from stench.json.
stench:cfg-baroffsetxmanual-comment: Moves the stench bar horizontally relative to the default HydrateOrDiedrate-style slot on the right side of the bottom HUD.
stench:cfg-baroffsetymanual-comment: Moves the stench bar vertically relative to its default HydrateOrDiedrate-style slot. Negative values move it upward.
stench:cfg-debugoffsetxmanual-comment: Moves the debug overlay horizontally relative to its default top-right anchor.
stench:cfg-debugoffsetymanual-comment: Moves the debug overlay vertically relative to its default top-right anchor.
